name: Kama

patchlogs.name: The New War: Hotfix 31.0.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed missing glow FX on the Dual Kamas Prime.

patchlogs.name: Update 29.5: Deimos Arcana
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the energy colour on Dual Kamas Prime not working properly.

patchlogs.name: Empyrean: Kuva Lich Changes 27.1.0 + 27.1.0.1
patchlogs.changes: Made a micro-optimization to a script used to animate the Dual Kamas.

patchlogs.name: The Old Blood: Hotfix 26.0.3
patchlogs.changes: Fixed Prova series, Kreska, Sheev, Machete series, Mire, Scoliac, Kama, Nami Solo, Plasma Sword and Destreza series not consuming Combo Counter on Heavy Attack.

patchlogs.name: Specters of the Rail: Hotfix 1
patchlogs.fixes: Corrected the type of Dual Kama awarded in the Neo V1 Relic. Should have been a Prime Blueprint.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.1.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed incorrect weapon mesh size when equipping Dual Kamas Nari & Vali Skin.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.6.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Trinity Prime and the Prime Dual Kamas not appearing in the Codex.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.6: Trinity Prime
patchlogs.fixes: The sensual lines of these golden Dual Kamas have long been celebrated as a masterwork of Tenno weapon smithing.

patchlogs.name: Update 11.1.0
patchlogs.fixes: Dual Kamas added to the Market

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 10.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Added proper BP icons for Kama and Soma.
